emails.subject: Cascade Marketing Agreement
emails.body: Barry, Attached is a memo describing the Cascade Marketing Agreement that I have been proposing. I would like to have a conference call with Gerald and Mark after you have had a chance to read my memo and the agreement. Thanks, Dave

emails.subject: RE: Cascade Marketing Agreement
emails.body: RE: Cascade Marketing Agreement Dave, I have read the proposal. Pls coordinate a tele conference with yourself, mark and me. sometime this a.m. Call jessica to set up a definative time. BT

emails.subject: RE: Cascade Marketing Agreement
emails.body: Will do... I will include Gerald also if that's OK with you. I need to do it this morning as I will be out at a meeting this afternoon.
